mapper.select: SELECT user_id, phone FROM USERS WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(phone, ':') = 0 ORDER BY user_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{batchSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT user_id, ci_value AS ciValue FROM USERS WHERE ci_value IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(ci_value, ':') = 0 ORDER BY user_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{batchSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(phone, ':') = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE ci_value IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(ci_value, ':') = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET phone = #{encryptedPhone}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET ci_value = #{encryptedCiValue}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, birth_date AS birthDate FROM USERS WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(birth_date, ':') = 0 ORDER BY user_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{batchSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND INSTR(birth_date, ':') = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET birth_date = #{encryptedBirthDate}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
